## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Goodcall to discuss SEO strategy, content performance, and action items.](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [UI improvements needed for mobile CMS pages, including layout and styling fixes](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Content performance showing positive trends: 146/150 articles indexed, 64 clicks generated last week](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [New keyword rankings emerging across answering service, appointment scheduling, and salon categories](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)
  - [Backlink strategy in place, focusing on high-difficulty keywords and organic link attraction](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates

  - [Danny's last day at Goodcall is tomorrow; Bob will temporarily oversee growth and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [GrowthX considering hiring client-specific engineers for CMS work in the future](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)

### Mobile UI Improvements

  - [Table of contents placement needs adjustment (move after H1 and image)](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Font sizes and spacing for H2s and H3s require optimization](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [Bullet point alignment needs fixing](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Bob to review and update master stylesheet in Webflow CMS](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=270.0)

### Content Performance

  - [146 out of 150 published articles indexed by Google](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
  - [64 clicks generated last week (March 30 - April 5)](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [Top performing topics: AI phone answering services, healthcare appointment scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=840.0)
  - [Projecting 70-75 clicks for next week](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=811.0)
  - [60k impressions achieved (best week so far)](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=813.0)

### Keyword Rankings

  - [New rankings emerging across various categories:](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1042.0)
      - [Answering service: towing, medical, cleaning, chiropractor, dental](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
      - Appointment scheduling: enterprise scheduling for insurance (\#2), automated scheduling (\#2)
      - [Salon: limited rankings due to recent publication, expected to improve](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1229.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Two-pronged approach:](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
    1.  Targeting high-difficulty keywords through publisher network
    2.  Creating content that organically attracts backlinks
  - [Example success story shared (landlord insurance costs keyword)](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1544.0)
  - [Firework case study: significant backlink growth after content strategy implementation](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1607.0)

### Action Items

1.  Bob to provide SEMrush account access for collaborative reporting
2.  Prateek to set up SEMrush dashboard with focused keyword groups
3.  Prateek to address mobile UI fixes
4.  Create content for Boulevard integration with AI answering services
5.  Continue work on BPO articles and salon content

## Next Steps

  - [Implement mobile UI improvements for CMS pages](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1449.0)
  - [Set up collaborative SEMrush dashboard for keyword tracking](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [Develop content for Boulevard integration](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Continue publishing remaining articles (50 more to reach 200 total)](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
  - [Bob to consider editorial content strategy for voice AI and Gen AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/FebZJHVsiAp_BtqZjudSGqs6W7VLzpQy?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
